p0_mbbs.topic: A Rare Case of Appendiceal Carcinoid Tumor Presenting as Acute Appendicitis in a Young Adult
p0_mbbs.description: Unusual presentation of carcinoid tumor mimicking acute appendicitis, with discussion of diagnostic workup and management.

p1_mdms.topic: Laparoscopic versus Open Appendectomy: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Postoperative Outcomes
p1_mdms.pico: Population: Adults with acute appendicitis; Intervention: Laparoscopic appendectomy; Comparison: Open appendectomy; Outcome: Wound infection, hospital stay, return to work

p2_dmmch.topic: Enhanced Recovery After Surgery (ERAS) Protocol in Elective Colorectal Surgery: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
p2_dmmch.methods: Prospective RCT, intention-to-treat analysis, multivariate regression

p3_faculty.topic: Network Meta-Analysis of Surgical Approaches for Pancreaticoduodenectomy: Comparing Open, Laparoscopic, and Robotic Techniques
p3_faculty.interventions: Open PD, Laparoscopic PD, Robotic PD, Hybrid approaches
p3_faculty.outcome: Mortality, morbidity, blood loss, operative time, RO resection rate
